# SetTranslatingAction.TranslationEngine.custom

**Case**

The translation was provided by a custom translation engine.

## Declaration

```swift
case custom
```

## Types

- **SetTranslatingAction.TranslationEngine.default**: The translation was provided by the system’s default translation engine.
